Defendant Felix Yagudaev' Motion For Change Of Venue
Off Calendar Jan-30-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: STEVEN SCOTT, ESQ., 925.825.9500 X815, FOR DEFENDANT FELIX YAGUDAEV; No other appearances.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. Defendant Felix Yagudaev's Motion For Change Of Venue is granted. It is in the interests of justice to have the same legal and factual issues resolved in one forum. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.)
